user_query: Visualize gross primary production (GPP) from the NASA VEDA STAC collection 'lis-global-da-gpp' over Mendocino County, California, June 2020 to November 2020. Use collection_id='lis-global-da-gpp' literally in tool calls. Report mean/median/min/max plus per-month values.
